# claude_environment (Data Source)

Look up an existing Claude Managed Agents environment by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Environment identifier.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) Archive timestamp, or null.
- `config` (Attributes) Sandbox configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `name` (String) Environment name.
- `type` (String) Object type.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Read-Only:

- `networking` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--networking))
- `packages` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--packages))
- `type` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--config--networking"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.networking`

Read-Only:

- `allow_mcp_servers` (Boolean)
- `allow_package_managers` (Boolean)
- `allowed_hosts` (List of String) Allowed hosts.
- `type` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--config--packages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.packages`

Read-Only:

- `apt` (List of String) System packages.
- `cargo` (List of String) Rust crates.
- `gem` (List of String) Ruby gems.
- `go` (List of String) Go modules.
- `npm` (List of String) Node.js packages.
- `pip` (List of String) Python packages.
